The system automatically warns of bulb replacement and equipment faults, remotely adjusts the air conditioning and playback equipment, ensures the viewing experience of the audience, and reduces operation and maintenance costs.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Intelligent Monitoring System for Coal Mine Ventilation
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: For coal mine safety production, monitor the airflow speed, gas (gas) concentration, CO concentration, and the switching status of main fans and wind doors in the tunnel in real time. The system automatically adjusts the air volume according to the gas concentration, alarms immediately when the gas exceeds the limit and cuts off the power supply in the area, ensuring the ventilation safety of underground operations.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Bank Vault Security and Environment System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: Serving banks and financial escort companies, monitor the vibration, infrared intrusion, temperature, and humidity inside the vault in real time. The system links video surveillance and alarm devices, ensures the safety of cash and important vouchers, prevents theft and moisture damage, and realizes the intelligent management of vault security.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Intelligent Monitoring System for Sewage Treatment Process
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: For sewage treatment plants, monitor water quality indicators such as dissolved oxygen (DO), pH value, COD, ammonia nitrogen, and the operating status of aeration blowers and sludge scrapers in real time. The system automatically adjusts the aeration volume and chemical dosage, optimizes the sewage treatment process, ensures that the effluent water quality meets the standard, and reduces energy and chemical consumption.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Office Meeting Room Management System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: Serving enterprise administration, monitor the personnel occupancy status (infrared/human presence) and air quality (CO2, temperature) of meeting rooms in real time. The system automatically releases booked but unused meeting rooms, links lights and air conditioners to save energy, displays the usage status of meeting rooms, improves the utilization efficiency of meeting resources and the comfort of the office environment.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Intelligent Monitoring System for Railway Pantograph-Catenary
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: For electrified railways, monitor the contact force, arc generation, and skateboard wear between the pantograph and the contact network in real time. The system analyzes the current collection quality, warns of abnormal wear or pantograph damage risks, provides data support for the maintenance of the pantograph-catenary system, and ensures the safe power supply of train operation.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Hospital Infusion Management System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: Serving hospital inpatient departments, monitor the drip rate and remaining liquid volume of infusion bags in real time. The system automatically alarms to the nurse station when the infusion is about to end or the drip rate is abnormal (needle blockage/leakage), monitors the patient's movement status (in bed/leaving), reduces the workload of nurses, and improves the safety of patient infusion.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Intelligent Monitoring System for Base Station Battery Backup
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: For communication tower operators, monitor the voltage, current, temperature, and remaining capacity (SOC) of the backup battery pack of the base station in real time. iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Supermarket Shopping Cart Management System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: Serving large supermarkets, use positioning technology to monitor the distribution and flow of shopping carts. iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Intelligent Monitoring System for Urban Sound Environment (Noise Map)
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: For environmental protection departments, deploy noise sensors in functional areas of the city to monitor noise decibel levels and frequency characteristics in real time. iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Factory AGV Logistics Scheduling System

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Board Game Cafe Passenger Flow Management System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent operation platform for board game cafes and leisure game centers, which dynamically captures passenger flow data of different game areas through infrared sensors, and records the usage duration of board game sets and table occupancy status. The system supports area reservation management, automatic reminder of game set return and disinfection, statistical analysis of passenger flow peak periods and popular game types, and maintenance reminders for passenger flow counting equipment. It optimizes space and game set management, and is suitable for board game cafes, game centers and leisure entertainment venues.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Blind Travel Assistance Monitoring System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent travel aid platform for visually impaired people, which dynamically monitors the surrounding environment (obstacles, road conditions, traffic lights) of the blind through ultrasonic sensors and GPS, and sends voice prompts in real time to guide safe travel. The system supports connection with smart city traffic systems, emergency help triggering (one-click call for help), statistical analysis of travel routes and obstacle encounter frequency, and maintenance reminders for wearable assistive devices. It improves the travel safety and independence of the blind, and is suitable for urban travel scenarios of visually impaired people in communities, commercial districts and transportation hubs.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Ice Cream Machine Operation Monitoring System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent equipment management platform for catering establishments with ice cream machines (fast food restaurants, dessert shops, convenience stores), which dynamically monitors the operating status, refrigerant level and temperature of ice cream machines, and triggers alarms when equipment malfunctions or raw materials are insufficient. The system records production volume and flavor sales data, conducts statistical analysis of equipment utilization rate and failure rate, and maintenance reminders for cleaning and refrigerant replenishment. It ensures the stable supply of ice cream products, and is suitable for ice cream machine management scenarios in fast food chains, dessert shops and retail stores.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Handmade Jewelry Workshop Material System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent material management platform for handmade jewelry workshops and accessory design studios, which dynamically monitors the inventory of precious metals, gemstones, beads and other raw materials, and records material usage for each jewelry design and production process. The system supports expiration date early warning (for non-precious materials), traceability of material sources, statistical analysis of material loss rate, and maintenance reminders for material storage equipment (such as anti-theft cabinets). It optimizes material management, reduces waste, and is suitable for handmade jewelry workshops, accessory design centers and craft production scenarios.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Shared Power Bank Scheduling System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent operation platform for shared power bank operators, which dynamically captures the real-time location, power level and usage status of power bank stations through sensors, and automatically plans scheduling routes for staff to replenish or relocate power banks. The system has functions of abnormal use alarm (such as damage to power banks), statistical analysis of usage peak periods and hot spots, and maintenance reminders for charging stations and power banks. It optimizes the allocation of shared power banks, improves user availability, and is suitable for shared power bank operation scenarios in shopping malls, restaurants and transportation hubs.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Winery Cellar Environment Control System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An environmental management platform for wineries and wine cellars, which continuously collects temperature, humidity, air pressure and light intensity data in the cellar, and automatically adjusts temperature and humidity control equipment according to the storage requirements of different grape varieties and wine ages. The system supports remote monitoring of cellar environment, traceability of wine storage conditions, statistical analysis of environmental impact on wine quality, and calibration reminders for environmental sensors. It ensures the quality of wine during storage, and is suitable for wine cellar management scenarios in wineries, high-end restaurants and private wine cellars.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Trampoline Park Safety Monitoring System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: A safety management platform for indoor trampoline parks and children's play centers, which dynamically monitors the load status of trampoline mats, the number of people in each area (to prevent overcrowding), and the operating status of protective equipment through pressure and infrared sensors. The system triggers safety alarms immediately when abnormal load or dangerous behavior is detected, supports real-time monitoring of video surveillance, statistical analysis of safety incident risks, and maintenance reminders for trampoline mats and protective fences. It ensures the safety of visitors (especially children), and is suitable for safety management scenarios of trampoline parks, children's play centers and adventure parks.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Outdoor Barbecue Grill Temperature Control System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent cooking equipment management platform for outdoor barbecue parks and self-service barbecue restaurants, which continuously monitors the temperature of barbecue grills (charcoal/gas), and automatically adjusts air intake or gas flow to maintain a stable cooking temperature. The system supports preset temperature for different ingredients (meat, vegetables, seafood), statistical analysis of fuel consumption, and maintenance reminders for grill burners and temperature sensors. It improves the barbecue experience and reduces fuel waste, and is suitable for outdoor barbecue parks, self-service barbecue restaurants and camping ground barbecue areas.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Laundromat Equipment Management System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent operation platform for self-service laundromats and community laundry centers, which dynamically monitors the operating status of washing machines, dryers and coin/card payment systems, and records usage time, water/electricity consumption and fault information. The system supports remote fault diagnosis, automatic reminder of equipment cleaning and maintenance, statistical analysis of equipment utilization rate and income, and calibration reminders for payment systems. It optimizes the operation efficiency of laundromats, and is suitable for self-service laundromats, community laundry centers and hotel laundry rooms.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Cigar Room Temperature and Humidity System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An environmental management platform for high-end cigar rooms and tobacco stores, which continuously collects temperature, humidity, air circulation and cigar storage density data in the cigar room, and automatically adjusts humidifiers, dehumidifiers and ventilation equipment to meet the strict storage requirements of cigars. The system supports remote monitoring of room environment, traceability of cigar storage conditions, statistical analysis of environmental impact on cigar quality, and maintenance reminders for environmental control equipment. It preserves the quality and flavor of cigars, and is suitable for cigar room management scenarios in high-end clubs, tobacco stores and private residences.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Roller Skating Rink Operation Monitoring System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent operation platform for indoor and outdoor roller skating rinks, which dynamically monitors the number of skaters in each area (to prevent overcrowding), the condition of skating surfaces, and the operating status of rental skates through infrared sensors and wear detection modules. The system triggers safety alarms for overcrowding or damaged skating surfaces, records rental information of skates, conducts statistical analysis of rink utilization rate and skate loss rate, and maintenance reminders for skating surface repair and skate maintenance. It ensures the safety and operation efficiency of roller skating rinks, and is suitable for roller skating rinks, sports centers and entertainment parks.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Silkworm Breeding Environment Monitoring System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An environmental management platform for sericulture farms and silk production bases, which continuously collects temperature, humidity, air quality and mulberry leaf freshness data in silkworm breeding rooms, and automatically adjusts environmental equipment according to the growth stages of silkworms (egg, larva, pupa, adult). The system has functions of silkworm growth status abnormal alarm, cocoon production statistical analysis, and maintenance reminders for environmental sensors. It optimizes silkworm breeding conditions, improves cocoon yield and quality, and is suitable for sericulture scenarios in rural sericulture bases and silk processing workshops.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Study Room Seat Management System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent management platform for self-study rooms and shared study spaces, which dynamically monitors the occupancy status of each seat through infrared sensors, and supports online reservation and real-time seat status query by users. The system records seat usage duration, conducts statistical analysis of peak usage periods and seat utilization rate, automatically reminds of overstay, and maintenance reminders for seat locking and occupancy detection equipment. It optimizes seat allocation, improves the utilization rate of study space, and is suitable for self-study rooms, libraries and shared study centers.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Mobile Coffee Cart Operation System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent operation platform for mobile coffee carts and street food vending vehicles, which continuously monitors energy consumption (battery/power), inventory of coffee raw materials, and sales data through sensors and POS systems. The system supports real-time positioning of the cart, automatic reminder of raw material replenishment and battery charging, statistical analysis of sales hot spots and peak periods, and maintenance reminders for coffee machines and refrigeration equipment. It optimizes the operation efficiency of mobile coffee carts, and is suitable for mobile vending scenarios in urban parks, business districts and event venues.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Pet Hospital Equipment Monitoring System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent equipment management platform for pet hospitals and veterinary clinics, which dynamically monitors the operating status of diagnostic equipment (ultrasound, blood analyzers), anesthesia machines, and incubators, and records equipment usage time and patient diagnosis data. The system has functions of equipment maintenance plan formulation based on usage intensity, fault real-time alarm, statistical analysis of equipment utilization rate, and calibration reminders for diagnostic equipment. It ensures the normal operation of medical equipment, and is suitable for equipment management scenarios in pet hospitals, veterinary clinics and animal health centers.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Incense Making Workshop Environment Control System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An environmental management platform for traditional incense making workshops and aromatic product production bases, which continuously collects temperature, humidity, air flow and incense raw material humidity data in the workshop, and automatically adjusts environmental equipment according to the process requirements of incense blending, kneading and drying. The system supports remote monitoring of workshop environment, traceability of incense production conditions, statistical analysis of environmental impact on incense aroma, and maintenance reminders for environmental control equipment. It preserves the traditional flavor and quality of incense products, and is suitable for incense making workshops, aromatic product factories and handicraft production scenarios.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Shared Umbrella Scheduling System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent operation platform for shared umbrella operators, which dynamically captures the real-time location and inventory status of umbrella sharing stations through GPS and infrared sensors, and automatically plans scheduling routes for staff to replenish umbrellas in rainy areas and retrieve them in sunny areas. The system has functions of overdue return alarm, statistical analysis of usage frequency and loss rate, and maintenance reminders for umbrella station locks and sensors. It optimizes the allocation of shared umbrellas, improves user availability, and is suitable for shared umbrella operation scenarios in shopping malls, subway stations and office buildings.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Pickled Vegetable Workshop Fermentation Environment System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An environmental management platform for pickled vegetable workshops and food processing factories, which continuously collects temperature, salinity, pH value and fermentation time data of pickled vegetable vats, and automatically adjusts fermentation conditions according to different pickled vegetable varieties and fermentation stages. The system has functions of fermentation quality traceability, abnormal fermentation alarm, statistical analysis of fermentation efficiency, and calibration reminders for sensors. It optimizes fermentation processes to improve the taste and safety of pickled vegetables, and is suitable for pickled vegetable workshops, food processing factories and rural characteristic food production scenarios.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Roller Skate Rental Monitoring System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An intelligent asset management platform for roller skate rental stores and sports equipment rental centers, which dynamically monitors the inventory, usage status (wear level) and rental information of roller skates (inline, quad), and records rental time, user information and return status. The system supports automatic overdue return reminders, statistical analysis of rental frequency and wear rate, and maintenance reminders for skate maintenance and replacement. It optimizes rental management, reduces loss, and is suitable for roller skate rental stores, sports clubs and entertainment park equipment rental scenarios.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Meditation Room Environment Regulation System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An environmental management platform for meditation rooms and wellness centers, which continuously collects indoor temperature, humidity, air quality, sound decibel and light intensity data, and automatically adjusts air conditioning, sound insulation equipment and lighting to create a quiet, comfortable and distraction-free meditation environment. The system supports remote monitoring of room environment, formulation of environment control plans for different meditation styles (mindfulness, transcendental), and maintenance reminders for environmental equipment. It improves the meditation experience, and is suitable for meditation rooms, wellness centers, spas and mental health counseling centers.

iotUserStoryRequirements.initialDemand: Smart Small Bee Farm Breeding Monitoring System
iotUserStoryRequirements.detailedDemand: An environmental management platform for small-scale bee farms and hobbyist beekeeping operations, which continuously collects temperature, humidity, hive weight and foraging activity data around beehives, and sends early warnings for abnormal hive conditions (such as pest infestation, queen bee loss). The system supports real-time monitoring of hive status via mobile App, statistical analysis of honey production and bee colony health, and maintenance reminders for monitoring sensors and hive equipment. It helps small-scale beekeepers manage colonies efficiently, improves honey yield, and is suitable for small bee farms, rural hobbyist beekeeping and urban rooftop beekeeping scenarios.
